props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Sets if the color of text should be colored for a light or dark dark background.

props.name: placement
props.description: Components placement, there’s no default placement.

props.name: size
props.description: Size the component small, large, or extra large.

props.name: visible
props.description: Toggle the visibility of sidebar component.

events.name: hide
events.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be hidden.

events.name: show
events.description: Callback fired when the component requests to be shown.

events.name: visible-change
events.description: Event emitted after visibility of component changed.
